case_title: SALARPOUR, MOHAMMED vs. SANCHEZ, JEFFERY et al

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF FEB-04-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON FEB-04-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR MAR-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-06-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-06-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TOTAL SANCTIONS $150.00. TO SHOW CAUSE WHY CASE SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED PER CRC 525., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-06-1994 CONTINUED FROM APR-06-1994 TO MAY-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALARPOUR, MOHAMMED AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, JEFFERY SANCHEZ, CHRISTINE DOES I THROUGH V SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          FEB-04-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-06-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-18-1994

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-07-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAR-07-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-06-1994 CONTINUED FROM MAR-07-1994 TO APR-06-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
